'''banguvu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:deacon|deacon]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-ng-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:deacon|deacon]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| banguvu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bængivith|bængivith]] || [[word:bængivij|bængivij]] || [[word:bængivish|bængivish]] || [[word:bængivi|bængivi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bangunguvuth|bangunguvuth]] || [[word:bangunguvuj|bangunguvuj]] || [[word:bangunguvush|bangunguvush]] || [[word:bangunguvu|bangunguvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:banguvuth|banguvuth]] || [[word:banguvuj|banguvuj]] || [[word:banguvush|banguvush]] || [[word:banguvu|banguvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bangufvuth|bangufvuth]] || [[word:bangufvuj|bangufvuj]] || [[word:bangufvush|bangufvush]] || [[word:bangufvuf|bangufvuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:banguvuthu|banguvuthu]] || [[word:banguvuju|banguvuju]] || [[word:banguvushu|banguvushu]] || [[word:banguvuku|banguvuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:banguvuth|banguvuth]] || [[word:banguvuj|banguvuj]] || [[word:banguvush|banguvush]] || [[word:banguvu|banguvu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:banguvuthul|banguvuthul]] || [[word:banguvujul|banguvujul]] || [[word:banguvushul|banguvushul]] || [[word:banguvukul|banguvukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:banguvuthuthu|banguvuthuthu]] || [[word:banguvujuju|banguvujuju]] || [[word:banguvushushu|banguvushushu]] || [[word:banguvuku|banguvuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:banguvuthun|banguvuthun]] || [[word:banguvujun|banguvujun]] || [[word:banguvushun|banguvushun]] || [[word:banguvukun|banguvukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:banguvuthuoro|banguvuthuoro]] || [[word:banguvujuoro|banguvujuoro]] || [[word:banguvushuoro|banguvushuoro]] || [[word:banguvukuoro|banguvukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
